examples: Albacore is one of the important temperate and productive species.
It was introduced to the Fleet air Arm as a replacement for the Fairey Swordfish and Fairey Albacore biplanes.
Due to their high methyl mercury content, limit white (albacore) tuna to 6 ounces per week and do not eat the following four types of fish: tilefish, shark, swordfish, and king mackerel.
Adding to the frustration: false albacore are really fun to catch on a fly rod.
We chase school after school of false albacore for half an hour and never once get a bite.
